name: The Hall of Mirrors
descriptionSeed: A city where every truth is understood to be a made thing, so the Veilwrights simply make better ones. Nothing is quite where it appears; hospitality is lavish and cannot be trusted; and everyone is scrupulously honest about the fact that they are lying, which they consider a higher form of candor than the Verists' brutality. They are charming. They mean it. Both of those are also true.
encounterFlavor: Hosts of impeccable warmth who have told you nine untrue things; a mask that fits too well; a Verist envoy visibly aging by the hour.
questSeeds: A truth has gotten loose in the Hall and is doing damage
Someone made a false version of a person and the false version is better and the person knows
